{{CargoRelic
|name=Sunday Star
|class_id=20928
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 1: Sunday marks the beginning of the week. As long as you maintain a smile, the deity of fortune will favor you!
|fame=31
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +10<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss2=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +20<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss3=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss4=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss7=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800<br> (Awakened)
}}
